productName: CalcuMake UX Stability Program (Public Funnel + Calculator)

userStories.title: Establish warning and funnel baseline before changes
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want reproducible desktop/mobile baseline evidence for public funnel and calculator warnings so fixes are measurable and non-regressive.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture baseline flow for /, /3d-print-pricing-calculator, /users/sign_up, /blog, /support on desktop and mobile.
Record current warning baseline (including storage default warning and CSS preload warning) and expected post-fix target.
Document baseline in implementation notes used by subsequent stories.

userStories.title: Prevent cookie consent from blocking sign-up submission
userStories.description: As an anonymous visitor, I want sign-up controls to remain clickable even when cookie consent is visible so I can complete account creation without UI blockers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a failing system test first proving sign-up submit is clickable with consent banner present.
Implement cookie banner layout/interaction fix so no pointer interception occurs on /users/sign_up.
Desktop and mobile sign-up submission path is passable with banner active.
Smoke suite remains deterministic and skip-free.

userStories.title: Guarantee visible sign-up validation feedback
userStories.description: As a visitor submitting invalid sign-up data, I want clear feedback so I understand what to fix.
acceptanceCriteria: Add failing system test for invalid email/password/password confirmation flow.
Validation outcome is visibly detectable in UI and asserted in tests.
No regression to existing auth links or page navigation.

userStories.title: Keep mobile funnel navigation and CTA reachability reliable
userStories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want to open nav and reach Sign up/Calculator CTAs quickly so the top-of-funnel path is frictionless.
acceptanceCriteria: Add failing mobile system/smoke test covering navbar toggle and CTA path to /users/sign_up and /3d-print-pricing-calculator.
Mobile nav renders actionable auth and calculator links without overlap/regression.
No hardcoded English selectors in system tests; use translation-safe selectors where applicable.

userStories.title: Initialize calculator defaults without warning noise
userStories.description: As a first-time calculator user, I want default state to load cleanly so the app feels stable and trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: Add failing Jest tests for empty localStorage initialization path in storage mixin.
Calculator first load creates/uses canonical default state without warning-level logs for expected empty state.
Public calculator remains fully interactive after initialization change.

userStories.title: Migrate legacy or partial calculator storage safely
userStories.description: As a returning user with older saved payloads, I want my saved calculations to load or recover safely so existing data is not lost unexpectedly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add failing Jest tests for partial/legacy/corrupt payloads.
Implement deterministic migration/reset behavior with explicit rules.
Retain warnings only for truly malformed payloads, not expected first-time usage.
Export flows (PDF/CSV) remain functional after storage changes.

userStories.title: Make locale suggestion non-blocking on mobile
userStories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want locale suggestions to assist me without overpowering the primary CTA area.
acceptanceCriteria: Add failing mobile system test asserting primary CTA remains quickly reachable with locale suggestion present.
Locale suggestion visual priority is reduced for mobile while preserving switch/stay actions.
Dismiss/stay choice persists and is verifiable by test.

userStories.title: Eliminate avoidable public-page CSS preload warnings
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want clean console output on public pages so warning channels highlight real regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit and correct preload usage for application stylesheet in layout/head.
Add test coverage (view/integration/system as appropriate) for intended asset-loading behavior.
Known preload warning is absent on /, /blog, /support, /users/sign_up, and calculator under normal load.

userStories.title: Preserve calculator and funnel functionality after UX fixes
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want UX hardening changes to avoid breaking existing calculator outputs and conversion routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Public calculator smoke journey remains deterministic and passing.
Auth routes, blog, and support navigation continue working in desktop/mobile flows.
No new console errors introduced in critical anonymous flows.

userStories.title: Enforce CLAUDE.md-aligned quality gates before merge
userStories.description: As the team, we want all UX program changes to be test-driven and CI-clean so release risk stays low.
acceptanceCriteria: Each story is implemented test-first (failing test before behavior change).
Run targeted suites (`npm test`, smoke/system, rails tests) during development.
Run `bin/ci` as final pre-merge gate and achieve passing status.
Smoke tests remain skip-free and deterministic per project testing plan.
